overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing the protagonist Arthur Morgan walking through the historic city of Saint Denis. The character ascends a covered stairway, traverses a garden courtyard, passes through a building into a hotel courtyard with cafe seating, and finally exits onto a busy pedestrian street with tram tracks and period-dressed pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stairway passage between historic buildings

agents.ego_description: walking up a covered stone stairway between tall brick walls, heading toward an exit visible at the top

entered.detail: stone steps ascending between tall brick walls with metal railings on the left side
weathered red brick walls forming the narrow passage
period advertisement posters plastered on the right wall
metal balcony or walkway visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow covered stairway between historic brick buildings. The passage is dimly lit with natural light filtering from above, featuring metal railings and period posters on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with garden and residential balconies

events.description: exits covered stairway into open courtyard with visible sky and vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking through a sunlit courtyard lined with potted plants and wrought-iron balconies, approaching a vine-covered archway

entered.detail: black metal garden archway covered in climbing vines and greenery
large terracotta pots with tropical plants and pink flowers lining the walkway
wrought-iron balconies on the upper floors of the surrounding buildings

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairway into a sunlit courtyard, the character walks past potted tropical plants and wrought-iron balconies. The path leads toward a vine-covered metal archway that marks the entrance to a garden area.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition through building from garden to interior courtyard

events.description: passes through wooden doorway from garden into building interior
exits building into bright courtyard with cafe seating and green awnings

agents.ego_description: walking through a garden archway, entering a building doorway, and emerging into a sunlit interior courtyard with outdoor seating

entered.detail: arched wooden doorway with glass panels marking the building entrance
black metal outdoor tables and chairs arranged in the courtyard
large white patio umbrellas providing shade over the seating areas
striped green canvas awning extending from the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the vine-covered archway and enters a building through a wooden doorway. After a brief interior passage, they emerge into a bright courtyard filled with cafe tables, white umbrellas, and green awnings.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel courtyard with outdoor cafe seating

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard past tables and chairs, approaching the main building entrance with arched doorways

entered.detail: three-story red brick building with arched ground floor openings and green shutters
wooden and metal benches placed along the courtyard walls

segments.scene_description: The character explores the spacious hotel courtyard, walking past outdoor seating areas with white umbrellas. The courtyard is surrounded by a three-story brick building with arched walkways on the ground floor and wrought-iron balconies above.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered passage leading to busy city street

events.description: exits dark corridor onto busy pedestrian street with tram tracks and crowds
character turns right onto the sidewalk and continues walking along the street

agents.ego_description: descending stairs through a dark corridor, exiting onto a busy street, and walking along the sidewalk among pedestrians in period clothing

notable_agents.action: woman in long dress walking toward the character before passing by
group of pedestrians standing and conversing near the building entrance

entered.detail: narrow dimly lit passage with stairs descending toward the street exit
row of historic brick buildings with balconies lining the street
metal tram tracks embedded in the cobblestone street
period-appropriate street lamps along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark covered passage, descends stairs, and emerges onto a bustling city street with tram tracks. Pedestrians in period clothing walk along the sidewalks past historic buildings with wrought-iron balconies and street lamps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the secluded, dim corridors of a historic district into the bright, bustling activity of a city street. It begins as the character ascends a narrow, dimly lit covered stairway between brick buildings, where natural light filters down onto metal railings and period posters. As the character emerges from the stairs, the environment opens into a sunlit courtyard filled with tropical plants and wrought-iron balconies, leading through a vine-covered archway and a brief interior passage. The scene then expands into a bright hotel courtyard characterized by white cafe umbrellas, green awnings, and three-story brick architecture with arched walkways. Finally, the camera follows the character through a dark covered passage and down a set of stairs, emerging onto a busy pedestrian street complete with tram tracks, street lamps, and people in period clothing.
